title: Extend BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL with `## Cite policy` section + test invariants
description: Insert a new `## Cite policy` H2 block into the byte-locked BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL constant immediately after the `## 知识库(KB)` section. This publishes the cite protocol text to all three end blocks (Claude Code AGENTS.md / Codex AGENTS.md / Cursor CLAUDE.md) via the existing fab install managed-block writer. Test invariant additions lock the section's presence so future edits can't silently drop the policy.

files.change: Insert `## Cite policy` H2 block (5 bullets: 触发 / [recalled] 验证 / 用户口头规则反查 / dismissed reason enum / 稽核 doctor --cite-coverage; locked verbatim text from task brief) after the `## 知识库(KB)` section's last line, before the closing template-literal backtick. Preserve byte-locked header comment intent (this IS the deliberate version bump for rc.20).

Add `expect(BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL).toContain('## Cite policy')` assertion alongside existing `## 行为规则` / `## 知识库(KB)` checks. Verify ≥400-byte guarantee still holds (will grow, not shrink). Add cite-policy bullet anchor assertions: contains 'KB:<id>', 'planned|recalled|chained-from', 'dismissed', 'fab doctor --cite-coverage'.

implementation: Read current BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL body at packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts:61-74 to confirm insertion offset (after last line of 知识库(KB) section, before closing backtick at L74).

Insert the locked verbatim cite-policy markdown block (5 bullets, exactly as specified in task brief) — preserve markdown formatting (bold labels, backtick code spans for KB: / fab_get_knowledge_sections / fab_extract_knowledge / search_context / fab doctor --cite-coverage / scope-mismatch / outdated / not-applicable / other:<text>).
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test bootstrap-canonical` to confirm existing tests still pass (length ≥400 bytes, two existing H2s present).
Add new test assertions for `## Cite policy` heading and key anchor strings (KB:<id>, tag enum, dismissed reason, fab doctor --cite-coverage).

reference.pattern: Byte-locked canonical constant + symmetric test invariants
reference.examples: rc.19 added BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL with two H2s + matching test assertions; this commit adds a third H2 + matching test.

rationale.chosen_approach: Inline the policy text inside the byte-locked canonical constant so it propagates to all three end blocks via the existing managed-block writer with zero new install plumbing.
alternatives_considered: Separate cite-policy.md file injected post-canonical (rejected: adds a second managed-block writer path)
Hook-side runtime injection (rejected: AI doesn't read hook scripts; canonical IS where AI looks)
decision_factors: Three-end propagation already solved by fab install
Single source of truth for protocol text
rationale.tradeoffs: Cite policy text now adds bytes to every AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md across user repos; acceptable since users are pre-launch.

manual_checks: Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test` and confirm all green
Visually inspect BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL diff to confirm cite policy text matches locked brief verbatim
Confirm no other test files broke (run full shared test suite)
success_metrics: bootstrap-canonical.test.ts passes with new `## Cite policy` assertion
Zero regressions in shared package test suite

criteria: BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL contains exact text '## Cite policy' as an H2 heading
All 5 dismissed-reason enum values present: scope-mismatch, outdated, not-applicable, other:<text>
bootstrap-canonical.test.ts passes with ≥1 new assertion for cite policy section
Commit msg: `feat(rc20): extend canonical with cite policy section (TASK-01)`
